purpose: Defines voice and audio direction for generated voiceovers and audio assets.

voice_style.delivery: natural commercial voice, not robotic, not exaggerated
voice_style.language: German-market ready, clear pronunciation, concise wording

audio_rules.hook: first sentence must create attention quickly
audio_rules.clarity: avoid long sentences and unclear claims
audio_rules.cta: end with a clear but not aggressive call to action

avoid: too many benefits in one sentence
